title: Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2035 ETF declares $0.182 dividend
content:
* Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2035 ETF (ZCBG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBG]) declares a $0.182/share quarterly dividend [https://www.globalxetfs.com/funds/ZCBG].
 	* 30-day SEC yield of 4.51%.
 	* Payable July 7; for shareholders of record July 1; ex-div July 1.
 	* See ZCBG Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBG/dividends?source=news_bullet]
